reviews.comment:
Las filas son aparatos diferentes combustibles. Bajen y pregunten. Infinita disiel es una cola y asi

(Translated by Google)
The lines are for different fuel types. Get out and ask. Infinita Diesel is a queue, and so on.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKMmVqdmJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lentos, poco personal, el playero comprando café en el salón con 40 autos en la fila, ¡y fue a merendar!

(Translated by Google)
Slow, understaffed, the beach attendant buying coffee at the lounge with 40 cars in line, and went to have a snack!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKc2RTdVdREAE

reviews.comment:
No tienen baños, supuestamente están en obra, deberían habilitar por lo menos baños químicos, también mucha demora,solo un playero atendiendo.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have bathrooms, supposedly they're under construction, they should at least provide portable toilets, there's also a lot of delay, only one attendant working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdW9lNzN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En Fiambalá no hay YPF. Se carga en Tinogasta, salvo que quieras cargar línea blanca

(Translated by Google)
There's no YPF station in Fiambalá. You have to fill up in Tinogasta, unless you're filling up on white goods.
